content:
type: DONE
my_files: src/click/core.py
note: Dynamic default resolution implemented: validation in Option.__init__ (right before to_info_dict, TypeError checks), Option.get_default now defers dict defaults (returns None when call=True, returns the raw dict when call=False so help text can show it), '(dynamic)' branch added in get_help_extra, and a new Command._resolve_dynamic_defaults method (called from main() right after make_context, before invoke) that does the second-pass resolution. Full 739-test suite passes locally. Did not touch Option.__init__ batch_size area, to_info_dict, or type_cast_value/process_value — only added a new method call site in main() near line 1409-1410 and a new method after parse_args (~line 1210). Let me know if that new method placement collides with anything on your end.
